fields.title: Campus SkillSwap — Django Project
fields.summary: A full-stack Django marketplace where students can post and discover skills to swap with each other.
fields.business_problem: Students often have skills that others need but lack a structured way to exchange them without money. Campus SkillSwap solves this by creating a peer-to-peer skill marketplace.
fields.description: Campus SkillSwap is a full-stack web application built with Django and SQLite. Students can create accounts, post skills they offer, browse available skills, and connect with other students. Update this with more detail through the Django admin panel.
fields.tools_used: Python, Django, SQLite, Bootstrap, HTML, CSS
fields.key_features: User authentication (register/login/logout), skill post creation and management, skill browsing and search, user dashboard, Django admin, Bootstrap styling.
fields.role: Full-stack developer — designed models, views, templates, URLs, authentication, and admin configuration.
fields.challenges: Biggest challenge description coming soon. Update this through the Django admin panel.
